title: psychotria stipularis
intro: Psychotria stipularis, also known as the shrub or wild forest shrub, is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Psychotria stipularis include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional medicine to make poultices and ointments for topical application.
